meaning: adj.优柔寡断的性格(或人),软弱的,没气力的,不稳的,(肌肉等)不结实的,松弛的
examples: You hear talk about American business being flabby.
This exercise is great for getting rid of flabby arms.
A few weeks of aerobics will firm up that flabby stomach.
General Motors is trimming down, Ford is still flabby, and Chrysler has had a setback.
To understand how Japan's once-mighty electronics industry has grown so flabby, consider the story of NEC.
